title: Just a lot more enchantments
description: Adds a lot more enchantments to the game
body:
Important: this mod is highly inspired by So many enchantments and Better Survival. I created this mod only for forge because im ducking tired of having to install extra stuff when all of this can be handle in one singular mod launcher (the worst part about modding in minecraft), tired of finding good mods but they need fabric + forge + thenextmodlauncherthatchangesnothingapi ?, just install this on forge.
Enchantment list:

[Just a lot more enchantments list.](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cn-MvpORVa9MVEJPcSW6LmypyT1SwJMjJEsUdYb3wbk/edit?gid=0#gid=0)

Porting to NeoForge after version 1.20.4.
Version 1.20.1 and 1.20.4 have a config file.
Added enchantment descriptions for Enchantment Descriptions mod.
Requires Progressive Mechanics Library mod.
